name: Sanjiv Khanna
text: Chief Justice of India: Sanjiv Khanna (since November 2024). Appointed under Article 124 of the Constitution. Head of Indian judiciary. Presides over Supreme Court. Administers oath to President and Vice President.

name: Girish Chandra Murmu
text: Comptroller and Auditor General (CAG): Girish Chandra Murmu (since August 2020). Appointed under Article 148. Audits all government expenditure. Reports to Parliament. Independent constitutional authority.

name: R. Venkataramani
text: Attorney General of India: R. Venkataramani (since October 2022). Appointed under Article 76. Chief legal advisor to Government of India. Right to audience in all courts. Not a government employee.

name: Tushar Mehta
text: Solicitor General of India: Tushar Mehta (since 2018). Second highest law officer after Attorney General. Represents Union of India in Supreme Court. Assists AG in legal matters of national importance.

name: Rajiv Kumar
text: Chief Election Commissioner: Rajiv Kumar (since May 2022). Appointed under Article 324. Heads the Election Commission which conducts all elections. Can only be removed by impeachment like a Supreme Court judge.

name: Manoj Soni
text: Chairman, Union Public Service Commission: Manoj Soni (since 2023). UPSC conducts Civil Services Examination (IAS, IPS, IFS). Appointed under Article 316. Independent constitutional body.

name: Arvind Panagariya
text: 16th Finance Commission Chairman: Arvind Panagariya (since 2024). Appointed under Article 280. Recommends distribution of tax revenues between Centre and States. Determines devolution formula.

name: Justice Arun Mishra
text: NHRC Chairperson: Justice Arun Mishra (since 2021). Investigates human rights violations. Can summon witnesses, examine evidence. Statutory body established under the Protection of Human Rights Act 1993.

name: Om Birla
text: Speaker of Lok Sabha: Om Birla (re-elected June 2024). Elected under Article 93. Presides over Lok Sabha sessions. Maintains order and interprets rules. Casts deciding vote in case of tie. Anti-defection decisions.

name: Jagdeep Dhankhar
text: Chairman of Rajya Sabha: Vice President Jagdeep Dhankhar (since August 2022). Under Article 89, the VP is ex-officio Chairman. Presides over Rajya Sabha sessions. Cannot vote except in case of tie.

name: Justice A.M. Khanwilkar
text: Lokpal of India: Justice A.M. Khanwilkar (since 2022). Anti-corruption ombudsman. Investigates complaints against public servants including PM (with safeguards). Established under the 2013 Act after Anna Hazare movement.

name: Ajay Kumar Sood
text: Principal Scientific Adviser to GOI: Prof. Ajay Kumar Sood (since 2022). Advises PM and Cabinet on science and technology policy. Coordinates national science missions and R&D priorities.
